name: flist-workbench
description: BBCode editor, log browser, and RAG chat over your own F-Chat logs.
author: Foundry Blaise <blaise@aiart-foundry.com>

scripts.pack:sidecar: cd sidecar && .venv\Scripts\pyinstaller.exe --onefile --windowed --name sidecar --noconfirm --collect-data certifi --hidden-import uvicorn.logging --hidden-import uvicorn.loops --hidden-import uvicorn.loops.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.http --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.http.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.websockets --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.websockets.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.lifespan --hidden-import uvicorn.lifespan.on server.py && node -e "require('node:fs').mkdirSync('../resources',{recursive:true});require('node:fs').copyFileSync('dist/sidecar.exe','../resources/sidecar.exe')"
scripts.pack:win: npm run rebuild:native && npm run build && npm run pack:sidecar && electron-builder --win --publish never
